title: Lololoshka Mod
description:
Мод с добавлением предметов из сезонов Лололошки :D

Mod with the addition of items from the seasons of Lololoshka :D
body:
RUS
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc698dd8436c25de4b87b61da7e6f305d1cbdc52_0.webp)

# Lololoshka Mod

### Мод который добавляет предметы из сюжетных сезонов Лололошки

_сделан в MCreator😁_

## Что есть в моде?

### ![adventurer_sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/484bf02c78127a9eee0cd6a686d29a2e2658f2f7_0.webp)Меч путишественника

С 3D моделькой!!1!1

### ![handle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0164b06327b3ac3cc049238d1c486cf99cd19717.png)Рукоять

Эксклюзивный предмет для этого мода

### ![spark](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/317ffb5332ffe8aa37b705d28b92b0cb317459f4.png)Спарки

Не выпадают с мобов, можно скрафтить _(используются в трейде с жителями)_

### ![oskolok](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c41c149b9bf5a614728c4af963551fd94929b1fd.png)Осколок скинта

используется в крафте ![kristall](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e9903705f5ad1620a2e43e0deee67598b5b410b5.png)Кристалла скинта

### ![kristall](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e9903705f5ad1620a2e43e0deee67598b5b410b5.png)Кристалл скинта

Светится😍

### No Image(( Маска Междумирца

Дает защиту (и все)

### ![JDPhone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8fa9d8f51ed06860518c8d1d11e8537f320f381e.png)JDPhone

Пустышка с 3D моделькой

### ![SYS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/812104f00c9be1a48e50a88c140c032f090ab49b.png)SYS-Кабель

Хз зачем

### ![V](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f6ff260640b91c8750030cc068a6a803b4e9d5b.png)Деньги с континента

Используются в торге с жителем

### ![Коробка от телефона](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3dc1364c92cc3fe32746e317a9466b70f980c0fb.png)Коробка с телефоном

В ней лежит JDPhone!

### ![ппп](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/857304bff717821da0a00eea6bcca06ddc62582b.png)Пустая коробка от телефона

В ней не лежит JDPhone((

![крафты](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f2073c6abea204e64a0e1ca85dbe0d8481b58a8.png)

Используй мод JEI

Use mod JEI

![тг](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01b163c30e2a9aeb819fd6e854f1e33cd3769ed3.png)

### Заходите в [Телеграм канал](https://t.me/lololoshkaMod) мода

Пишите в чат если нашли баг или идеи по улучшению мода!

ENG

![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc698dd8436c25de4b87b61da7e6f305d1cbdc52_0.webp)

# Lololoshka Mod

### Mod that adds items from Lololoshka's story seasons

_made in MCreator😁_

## What's in the mod?

### ![adventurer_sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/484bf02c78127a9eee0cd6a686d29a2e2658f2f7_0.webp)Adventurer's Sword

With 3D model!!1!1

### ![handle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0164b06327b3ac3cc049238d1c486cf99cd19717.png)Handle

Exclusive item for this mod

### ![spark](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/317ffb5332ffe8aa37b705d28b92b0cb317459f4.png)Sparks

Do not drop from mobs, can be crafted _(used in trade with villagers)_

### ![oskolok](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c41c149b9bf5a614728c4af963551fd94929b1fd.png)Skint shard

used in crafting ![kristall](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e9903705f5ad1620a2e43e0deee67598b5b410b5.png)Skint Crystal

### ![kristall](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e9903705f5ad1620a2e43e0deee67598b5b410b5.png)Skint Crystal

Glows😍

### No Image(( Interworld Mask

Gives protection (and that's all)

### ![JDPhone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8fa9d8f51ed06860518c8d1d11e8537f320f381e.png)JDPhone

Dummy with 3D model

### ![SYS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/812104f00c9be1a48e50a88c140c032f090ab49b.png)SYS-Cable

I don't know why

### ![V](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f6ff260640b91c8750030cc068a6a803b4e9d5b.png)Continental Money

Used in bargaining with a resident

### ![Phone Box](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3dc1364c92cc3fe32746e317a9466b70f980c0fb.png)Phone Box

It contains a JDPhone!

### ![ppp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/857304bff717821da0a00eea6bcca06ddc62582b.png)Empty phone box

It doesn't contain a JDPhone((

![тг](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01b163c30e2a9aeb819fd6e854f1e33cd3769ed3.png)

### Come in [Telegram channel](https://t.me/lololoshkaMod) mod

Write in the chat if you found a bug or ideas for improving the mod!
